Document:
# Rule 2 – No Griefing/Ban evasion Rejoining the Starlight servers in any way during a ban window will be considered ban evasion. This will result in a permanent unappealable ban from all Starlight servers.
Intentionally ruining gameplay for others is prohibited. Round-ending or highly disruptive actions, such as: - Releasing the Tesla/Singularity - Intentionally Plasma or Tritium flooding the entire station
May result in a permanent ban. Some objectives or circumstances may allow exceptions—when in doubt, ask an admin before proceeding.
Bugs and exploits are not banned on the Delta server. Please feel free to find and report them when you do.
## AFK Farming AFK farming time for Role Requirements is prohibited—players must actively engage and contribute to the game.
